additional_rules.name: circular-dependency-import
additional_rules.message: Relative import crossing project boundary — use workspace alias (e.g., @myorg/lib-name) to enforce module boundaries
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace relative cross-project import with the project's public API alias defined in tsconfig.base.json paths

additional_rules.name: missing-project-tags
additional_rules.message: Project has empty tags — add type and scope tags for module boundary enforcement
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add tags like ["type:lib", "scope:shared"] to enable @nx/enforce-module-boundaries constraints

additional_rules.name: direct-tool-invocation
additional_rules.message: Direct tool invocation in package.json scripts — use Nx executors or inferred targets to preserve caching and task ordering
additional_rules.fix_hint: Remove direct tool scripts and configure targets in project.json or let Nx infer them from the tool config files

additional_rules.name: workspace-json-legacy
additional_rules.message: workspace.json is a legacy Nx format — use nx.json with inferred project configuration
additional_rules.fix_hint: Migrate to nx.json targetDefaults and remove workspace.json. Run nx migrate to automate.

additional_rules.name: missing-outputs-config
additional_rules.message: Target with dependsOn should also declare outputs for proper cache behavior
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add "outputs": ["{projectRoot}/dist"] (or appropriate output paths) alongside dependsOn to enable output caching
